name: FRANKLIN FINANCIAL SERVICES CORP /PA/
business: Franklin Financial Services Corporation operates through its wholly owned subsidiary, F&M Trust, a Pennsylvania-chartered commercial bank and trust company. F&M Trust provides a wide variety of banking services to businesses, individuals, and governmental entities, including accepting deposits, making loans, and offering investment and trust services through its Wealth Management segment. The bank operates 23 community banking offices in south-central Pennsylvania and Washington County, Maryland.

exposures.sentence: Our operational or security systems may experience interruption or breach in security, including cyber-attacks.

The Corporation may use artificial intelligence (AI) in its business, and challenges with properly managing its use could result in disruption of its internal operations, reputational harm, competitive harm, legal liability and adversely affect its results of operations and stock price.
